text: Artificial intelligence is changing the way we work. Many routine tasks, such as data entry or scheduling, can now be automated, freeing up employees for more creative and strategic activities. Productivity tools powered by AI help workers analyse information faster and make better decisions. However, this doesn't mean humans are being replaced. Instead, we are seeing more human-AI collaboration, where people and machines work together to achieve better results. While some jobs may disappear, new roles are emerging, such as AI trainers and ethics specialists. Workers will need to adapt by learning new skills, but the future of work looks more efficient and innovative.
